name: Twilio
one_liner: Cloud communications platform providing programmable SMS, voice, WhatsApp, email, and verification APIs.
primary_auth: HTTP Basic auth using Account SID + Auth Token (or API Key SID/Secret) over HTTPS.
access_notes: Free trial account (phone-verified, no payment required) instantly provides a working Account SID and Auth Token plus trial credit. Trial has restrictions (verified numbers only, messaging watermark) but credentials work immediately against the live REST API.
api_notes: APIs organized around REST over HTTPS; official SDKs (Node, Python, etc.). Over 1,800 endpoints across 30+ products (Messaging, Voice, Verify, Lookup, WhatsApp, SendGrid email, etc.).
mcp_notes: Twilio ships an official hosted docs MCP server at mcp.twilio.com/docs (search/retrieve API specs, read-only, no auth) and twilio-labs/mcp on GitHub exposing all Twilio APIs as MCP tools. In public beta; available as a Claude connector.
main_blocker: None for building; trial accounts have sending restrictions (verified recipients only) until upgraded to a paid account.

evidence.claim: Twilio APIs are organized around REST, usable over HTTPS or via SDKs; auth via Account SID, Auth Token, API keys.
Twilio ships an official hosted MCP server (mcp.twilio.com/docs) indexing 1,800+ endpoints across 30+ products, no auth required.
twilio-labs/mcp monorepo exposes all of Twilio's API as MCP tools.
